Table FACT_GCTS_RESPONSE

Card of table FACT_GCTS_RESPONSE

Name

FACT_GCTS_RESPONSE

Code

FACT_GCTS_RESPONSE

DBMS

ANSI Level 2


Description of the table FACT_GCTS_RESPONSE

---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Fakt table will base on feed:

select
*,
YEAR( DATEADD(week, week, TO_DATE("YEAR"||'-01-01'))) * 10000 + MONTH( DATEADD(week, week, TO_DATE("YEAR"||'-01-01'))) * 100 + DAY( DATEADD(week, week, TO_DATE("YEAR"||'-01-01'))) as DIM_DATE_KEY ,
c.dim_country_key DIM_COUNTRY_KEY
from DB_CONS_STG_DEV.STG_GCTS.V_GCTS_RESPONSE r
join (
select
COUNTRYCATEGORYID,
CASE
WHEN country='Saudi Arabia Female' THEN 'Saudi Arabia'
ELSE country
END as country_global
from DB_CONS_STG_DEV.STG_GCTS.V_GCTS_COUNTRY_CATEGORY
where _ETL_ACTIVE_FLAG=true) cc on r.COUNTRYCATEGORYID=cc.COUNTRYCATEGORYID
join SH_SDDCOMMON_DE_QAS.COMMON.DIM_COUNTRY c on cc.country_global=c.country
where r._ETL_ACTIVE_FLAG=true

---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Unique row will be defined by:
variableid + crountrycodeid + responsename - on source side
DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY + DIM_GCTS_OPTIONS_KEY - on fact side

---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Columns mapping:
DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY <- MD5(variableid||COUNTRYCATEGORYID )
DIM_GCTS_COUNTRY_KEY <- country - calculated column available after joining with country category
DIM_GCTS_OPTIONS_KEY <- MD5(variableid||COUNTRYCATEGORYID||RESPONSENAME)
DIM_DATE_KEY <- calculated,
other 1:1


---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Calculation for country should based on case statement because not each country from aplication has proper position in dom_country which is global dictionary based on ISO standard:
select
COUNTRYCATEGORYID,
CASE
WHEN country='Saudi Arabia Female' THEN 'Saudi Arabia'
ELSE country
END as country_global
from DB_CONS_STG_DEV.STG_GCTS.V_GCTS_COUNTRY_CATEGORY
where _ETL_ACTIVE_FLAG=true

---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Date should besed on year + week column from feed:
YEAR( DATEADD(week, week, TO_DATE("YEAR"||'-01-01'))) * 10000 + MONTH( DATEADD(week, week, TO_DATE("YEAR"||'-01-01'))) * 100 + DAY( DATEADD(week, week, TO_DATE("YEAR"||'-01-01'))) as


Check constraint name of the table FACT_GCTS_RESPONSE

CKT_FACT_GCTS_RESPONSE


Server validation rule of the table FACT_GCTS_RESPONSE

%RULES%


Code preview of the table FACT_GCTS_RESPONSE

drop index R_5_FK;

drop index R_4_FK;

drop index R_2_FK;

drop index R_1_FK;

drop table FACT_GCTS_RESPONSE cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: FACT_GCTS_RESPONSE
--==============================================================
create table FACT_GCTS_RESPONSE (
DIM_DATE_KEY INTEGER not null,
DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY CHAR(254) not null,
DIM_GCTS_OPTIONS_KEY CHAR(254) not null,
DIM_COUNTRY_KEY INTEGER not null,
ID INTEGER,
SERIAL CHAR(254),
RESPONSELABEL CHAR(254),
WEIGHT FLOAT,
D_WEIGHT1 FLOAT,
D_WEIGHT2 FLOAT,
D_WEIGHT3 FLOAT,
WAVE CHAR(254),
CMQY INTEGER,
SCMQY INTEGER,
_ETL_LOAD_DATETIME TIME,
_ETL_RUN_ID NUMERIC,
_ETL_JOB_ID NUMERIC,
foreign key (DIM_DATE_KEY)
references DIM_DATE (DIM_DATE_KEY),
foreign key (DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY)
references DIM_GCTS_QUESTION (DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY),
foreign key (DIM_GCTS_OPTIONS_KEY)
references DIM_GCTS_OPTION (DIM_GCTS_OPTIONS_KEY),
foreign key (DIM_COUNTRY_KEY)
references DIM_COUNTRY (DIM_COUNTRY_KEY)
);

--==============================================================
-- Index: R_1_FK
--==============================================================
create index R_1_FK on FACT_GCTS_RESPONSE (
DIM_DATE_KEY ASC
);

--==============================================================
-- Index: R_2_FK
--==============================================================
create index R_2_FK on FACT_GCTS_RESPONSE (
DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY ASC
);

--==============================================================
-- Index: R_4_FK
--==============================================================
create index R_4_FK on FACT_GCTS_RESPONSE (
DIM_GCTS_OPTIONS_KEY ASC
);

--==============================================================
-- Index: R_5_FK
--==============================================================
create index R_5_FK on FACT_GCTS_RESPONSE (
DIM_COUNTRY_KEY ASC
);
